goal: 合并 GitHub 新一批开放 PR

summary.title: 合并 GitHub 开放 PR #20-#28
summary.what: 隔离合并前本地 skill package 删除改动后，将 GitHub 开放 PR #20 到 #28 squash merge 到 main，并把本地 main 快进到 origin/main。过程中更新 #26 和 #28 的 PR 分支解决与前序 PR 的冲突，最后开放 PR 队列清空。
summary.why: 用户要求处理新一批 GitHub PR；这些 PR 覆盖 CJK/query/status 测试、ranking 重构、selector SQL 安全、sync/indexer 性能、source inventory 异步化等改动，需要按顺序合入并保持 main 可验证。

decisions.chose: 先 stash 合并前的 skill-packages/cxs 删除改动，再处理 PR。
decisions.rationale: 这些删除不属于 GitHub PR 合并任务；隔离后可以保持合并证据干净，也避免误把本地未提交改动带入 seal。

decisions.chose: 按 #20-#28 编号顺序逐个 squash merge，并在每次合并后 fast-forward 本地 main。
decisions.rationale: 顺序合并能把后续 PR 与最新 main 的冲突暴露在正确上下文里，便于最小化解决。

decisions.chose: #26 冲突解决同时保留批量 getIndexedSessionMetas 和 bounded worker 并发 parseCodexSession。
decisions.rationale: 两项优化作用在不同瓶颈：前者减少 SQLite N+1 metadata 查询，后者减少文件解析 I/O 串行等待，可以组合。

decisions.chose: #28 冲突解决保留异步 source inventory、status/CLI await 链、close failure warning，以及 bolt 中三条性能经验记录。
decisions.rationale: 异步 inventory 是 #28 的核心行为变更；close warning 来自 #21 的可观测性改进；bolt 记录互补，不应互相覆盖。

review_notes: 最终 gh pr list --state open 返回空数组。
最终 npm run check 通过：23 个 test files、115 个 tests。
合并前本地删除改动保存在 stash：pre-pr-merge-skill-package-deletions。

architectural_claims: source inventory collection is now asynchronous and returns Promise-based inventory/snapshot APIs.
sync operation collection now combines batched indexed metadata lookup with bounded concurrent session parsing.
rerankHits internals were split into smaller helper functions while preserving the public ranking surface.
behavioral_changes: status command action awaits collectStatus because status source inventory is now async.
collectSourceInventory, collectSourceSnapshot, and collectSourceFiles use node:fs/promises opendir/stat/open and async loops instead of synchronous directory walking.
readCwdMetadata close failures are explicitly logged instead of silently swallowed.
sync metadata collection avoids per-file SQLite lookups by batching file_path IN queries before parsing sessions.
selectorWhereSql SQL identifier handling is covered by security tests.
CJK classification, queryTerms extraction, status collection, ranking, and tokenize behavior gained regression tests.
security_implications: selectorWhereSql SQL injection guard is covered by added tests and SQL escaping adjustment.
migration_notes: Internal TypeScript callers/tests were updated to await async status/source inventory APIs; no persisted schema migration was introduced.
